tuning: E A D G B E
content:
------------------------------------------------------------------------
                   THE BEST DAY - George Strait
------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tabbed By: Barry Miles

* = one downstrum

[ch]B7[/ch] = x2120x

[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch]*   [ch]B7[/ch]*   [ch]C[/ch]*   [ch]D[/ch]*

[Verse 1]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
We loaded up my old station wagon[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
With a tent, a Coleman and sleepin' bags.[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]
Some fishin' poles, a cooler of Cokes,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
Three days before we had to be back.[/tab]

[Pre-chorus 1]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
When you're seven you're in seventh heaven[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
When you're goin' campin' in the wild outdoors.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
As we turned off on that old dirt road[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]
He looked at me and swore...[/tab]

[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
Dad, this could be the best day of my life.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]                                     [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
I've been dreamin' day and night about the fun we'll have.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]G7[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]A7[/ch]
Just me and you doin' what I've always wanted to.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
I'm the luckiest boy alive,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]B7[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
This is the best day of my life.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
His fifteenth birthday rolled around,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
 Classic cars were his thing.[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]C[/ch]
When I pulled in the drive with that old Vette[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
I thought that boy would go insane.[/tab]

[Pre-chorus 2]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
When you're in your teens[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Your dreams revolve around four spinnin' wheels.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
We worked nights on end 'till it was new again,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
And as he sat behind the wheel he said,[/tab]

[Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
Dad, this could be the best day of my life.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]                                     [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
I've been dreamin' day and night about the fun we've had.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]G7[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]A7[/ch]
Just me and you doin' what I've always wanted to.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
I'm the luckiest boy alive,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]G/A[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]
This is the best day of my life.[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G/B[/ch]
Standin' in a little room[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
Back of the church with our tuxes on,[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G/B[/ch]
Lookin' at him I say,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
I can't believe, son that you're grown.[/tab]

[Chorus 3]

He said
[tab][ch]G[/ch]*        [ch]D[/ch]*           [ch]Am[/ch]*            [ch]C[/ch]*
Dad, this could be the best day of my life.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]*               [ch]D[/ch]*              [ch]G[/ch]*      [ch]D[/ch]*
I've been dreamin' day and night of bein' like you.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]G7[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]A7[/ch]
Now it's me and her, watchin' you and mom I've learned,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
I'm the luckiest man alive,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
This is the best day of my life.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
I'm the luckiest man alive,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]*               [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]B7[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]*
This is the best day of my life.[/tab]
